data.title: Solana's XRP Tease Sparks Speculation Among Crypto Enthusiasts
data.description: Solana recently stirred excitement in the cryptocurrency community by posting a cryptic message featuring the word "XRP" accompanied by a brief logo animation on X, attracting millions of views within hours. According to NS3.AI, the post was followed by XRP-themed responses such as "time to flip the switch" and "we signed 589 NDAs," fueling speculation about potential developments. However, no official partnership or integration between Solana and XRP has been announced, leaving the community curious about the implications of these posts.

data.title: Kalshi to Introduce Parent Portal and Selfie Checks Following Age Rule Breach
data.description: Kalshi is set to implement a parent portal and selfie verification checks after minors circumvented its age restriction by using parental identification. According to NS3.AI, this development occurs as Kalshi remains engaged in legal battles at the state level concerning sports and election event contracts.

data.title: Maine Governor Faces Decision on AI Data Center Moratorium
data.description: Maine Governor Janet Mills is faced with a decision on whether to approve or veto a legislative bill that seeks to halt the development of new large AI data centers in the state for more than a year. According to NS3.AI, Governor Mills expressed a desire for an exemption for a proposed $550 million data center project in Jay, but the lawmakers did not incorporate such an exemption in the bill.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Allbirds Joins List of Companies Benefiting from AI Pivot
data.description: Allbirds has recently made headlines by successfully leveraging an artificial intelligence pivot to boost its stock market performance. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting that Allbirds is not alone in this trend, as several other companies have also experienced significant gains by shifting their focus towards AI and digital technologies. This strategic move has proven beneficial for firms across various industries, demonstrating the growing influence and potential of AI in driving business success. As more companies explore AI-driven strategies, the market continues to witness transformative changes, underscoring the importance of innovation in today's competitive landscape.

data.title: ECB Executive Board Member Schnabel Discusses Inflation and Monetary Policy
data.description: European Central Bank Executive Board Member Isabel Schnabel stated that the ECB is in a relatively advantageous position. According to Jin10, she noted that prior to the onset of the war, the ECB successfully reduced inflation to 2%, and the overall stance of monetary policy was neutral.

data.title: AI TRENDS | AI Utilized in Production of 'Bitcoin: Killing Satoshi' Starring Casey Affleck and Gal Gadot
data.description: The $70 million film "Bitcoin: Killing Satoshi," featuring Casey Affleck and Gal Gadot, has made extensive use of artificial intelligence in its production. According to NS3.AI, producer Ryan Kavanaugh revealed that the team substituted on-location filming for approximately 200 settings with AI-generated environments. The film is set to be presented at Cannes next week.

data.title: CoreWeave Secures $6 Billion AI Compute Deal with Jane Street
data.description: CoreWeave has entered into a $6 billion agreement with Jane Street to supply AI computing resources for the trading firm's operations in trading and research. According to NS3.AI, Jane Street has also acquired $1 billion worth of CoreWeave Class A common stock at a price of $109 per share. CoreWeave, originally a cryptocurrency mining company, shifted its focus to AI infrastructure in 2019.

data.title: SpaceX Organizes Site Visits for Major IPO Investors, Insider Reports
data.description: SpaceX is reportedly arranging site visits for significant investors ahead of its anticipated initial public offering (IPO). According to Jin10, insiders have revealed that the company is facilitating these visits to provide potential investors with a closer look at its operations and future prospects. This move is seen as part of SpaceX's broader strategy to attract substantial investment and ensure a successful IPO. The company, known for its ambitious space exploration and satellite projects, aims to showcase its technological advancements and operational capabilities during these visits. The exact timeline for the IPO remains undisclosed, but these preparations indicate that SpaceX is gearing up for a major financial milestone.

data.title: Tether's Political Action Committee Receives Initial Funding from Cantor Fitzgerald and Anchorage Digital
data.description:
Tether, a prominent player in the cryptocurrency sector, has been linked to a new political action committee. According to CoinDesk, the initial funding for this committee was provided by Cantor Fitzgerald and Anchorage Digital. This development highlights the growing intersection between the cryptocurrency industry and political advocacy.

The involvement of Cantor Fitzgerald and Anchorage Digital in the funding process underscores the increasing interest of traditional financial institutions in the digital currency space. As the cryptocurrency market continues to expand, stakeholders from various sectors are seeking to influence policy and regulatory frameworks that could impact the future of digital assets. This move by Tether and its partners reflects a strategic effort to engage with policymakers and shape the discourse around cryptocurrency regulation.

The emergence of this political action committee signifies a broader trend of cryptocurrency companies becoming more active in political and regulatory arenas. By aligning with established financial entities like Cantor Fitzgerald and Anchorage Digital, Tether is positioning itself to have a voice in the ongoing discussions about the role of digital currencies in the global financial system. This collaboration could pave the way for more robust advocacy efforts aimed at fostering a favorable environment for the growth and adoption of cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Fellowship PAC Secures $3 Million in Advertising Services
data.description: Fellowship PAC has arranged $3 million in advertising services through Nxum Group, a company co-founded by Tether US CEO Bo Hines. According to NS3.AI, Federal Election Commission filings reveal that the PAC has raised a total of $11 million. This includes significant contributions of $10 million from Cantor Fitzgerald and $1 million from Anchorage Digital. The super PAC is supporting Republican candidates in both congressional and gubernatorial races.

data.title: IMF: Japan's Central Bank Can Overlook Inflation from Middle East Conflict
data.description: The International Monetary Fund's (IMF) Japan mission chief, Rahul Anand, stated on Wednesday that the Bank of Japan can 'overlook' inflationary pressures stemming from the Middle East conflict, as the secondary effects on broader prices are expected to be limited. According to Jin10, while the conflict has led to increased fuel costs, raising overall inflation, the Bank of Japan can maintain its gradual interest rate hike path, as these price pressures are unlikely to unanchor inflation expectations. Anand noted that higher prices are unlikely to transmit to core inflation or wages, suggesting that the secondary effects will be milder compared to other countries. Even if overall inflation temporarily rises, the Bank of Japan can disregard this and continue its planned exit from accommodative policies. The IMF still expects Japan's inflation to return to its 2% target by the end of 2027 and anticipates that the central bank will raise interest rates three more times by mid or late next year, increasing the policy rate from the current 0.75% to 1.5%. Anand also mentioned that the impact of the yen's depreciation in 2025 on inflation transmission is not significant and has somewhat cushioned the impact of rising U.S. tariffs. He emphasized that exchange rates should be determined by the market.

data.title: Bitcoin Surpasses 75,000 USDT Mark with Daily Increase
data.description: Bitcoin has exceeded the 75,000 USDT threshold, currently priced at 75,003.85 USDT, marking a daily rise of 1.16%. According to Foresight News, this development was observed through Bitget's market data.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Contributes $10 Million to Pro-Crypto Super PAC
data.description: Cantor Fitzgerald has made a significant financial contribution to a super PAC aimed at supporting U.S. political candidates who favor cryptocurrency. Bloomberg posted on X that the financial services firm donated $10 million to the political action committee, which is led by its largest client. This move underscores Cantor Fitzgerald's commitment to advancing the interests of the cryptocurrency sector by backing candidates who are likely to support favorable regulations and policies. The donation highlights the growing influence of cryptocurrency in political circles and the increasing efforts by industry stakeholders to shape the legislative landscape in their favor.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 75,000 USDT with a 1.48% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2026, 19:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 75,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 75,142.03125 USDT, with a narrowed 1.48% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Legal & General Asset Management Adopts Blockchain for Money Market Funds
data.description:
Legal & General Asset Management (LGAM) is transitioning its longstanding money market funds to blockchain technology to enhance accessibility and expedite settlement processes. According to CoinDesk, this move marks a significant shift in how traditional financial instruments are managed, leveraging blockchain's capabilities to streamline operations and improve efficiency.

The integration of blockchain technology into LGAM's money market funds aims to provide a more transparent and efficient framework for transactions. By adopting blockchain, LGAM seeks to offer investors quicker settlement times and broaden access to these financial products. This development reflects a growing trend among financial institutions to incorporate blockchain solutions to modernize their operations and meet the evolving demands of the market. The decision underscores the potential of blockchain to transform traditional financial systems, offering a glimpse into the future of asset management.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Pledges to Combat Fraud and Insider Trading
data.description: CFTC Chairman Michael Selig has committed to intensifying efforts against fraud and insider trading. According to NS3.AI, Selig made this pledge in a written statement submitted to Congress, emphasizing the importance of maintaining market integrity and protecting investors. The statement outlines the CFTC's strategy to enhance surveillance and enforcement actions to deter illicit activities in the financial markets. Selig's commitment reflects a broader regulatory push to ensure transparency and fairness in trading practices.

data.title: Alibaba Reduces Free Tier for Qwen Code, Introduces New Subscription Plan
data.description: Alibaba has announced the termination of the free tier for its Qwen Code service, significantly reducing the daily free request quota from 1,000 to 100. According to NS3.AI, users are now encouraged to transition to alternative platforms such as Alibaba Cloud Coding Plan, OpenRouter, Fireworks AI, or utilize their own API keys. The new Coding Plan Pro subscription is priced at $50 per month. This adjustment follows closely on the heels of MiniMax's recent implementation of written authorization requirements for the commercial use of its M2.7 model, which took effect 48 hours prior.

data.title: Bank of England Governor Highlights Slow Progress on International Stablecoin Standards
data.description: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey has expressed concerns over the slow progress in establishing international standards for stablecoins over the past year. According to NS3.AI, Bailey emphasized the necessity for common cross-border regulations to ensure 'assured value,' which refers to the confidence that stablecoins can be redeemed at their face value. His remarks come as both Britain and the United States continue to advance their domestic regulations for stablecoins.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Mester Comments on Inflation Trends
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mester has indicated that the diminishing impact of tariffs will aid in reducing inflation. According to ChainCatcher, Mester also noted that housing inflation is moving in the right direction.

data.title: Fed's Mussa: Oil Price Shock Likely Driving Core Inflation Upward
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mussa has indicated that the recent surge in oil prices may be contributing to an increase in core inflation. According to Jin10, Mussa expects core inflation to approach 3% by the end of the year. This assessment comes amid ongoing concerns about the impact of energy costs on broader economic indicators. The Federal Reserve continues to monitor these developments closely as they evaluate potential policy responses.
